description: Five-stage semantic segmentation proposals for the 33 trimmed successful OpenARM2 shirt-fold demonstrations. Optional recentering and refinement are separated from fold motions; the three frozen v2 outcome-quality observations remain distinct from motion-stage labels.

generation_contract.quality_contract: Outcome quality remains attached to three observation frames and must not be interpreted as quality of recenter_pull, side_two motion, or strip_refinement in isolation.
